sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'G':
        b = n['boundary']
        row = sum(p[0] for p in b) // len(b)
        col = sum(p[1] for p in b) // len(b)
        print(f"Node {n['id']} color={n['color']} row={row} col={col}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
